---
title: "Participate"
---

We encourage participants to join us from any background and experience. 

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Participant support

There is no cost to attend.

We will provide lunch and refreshments.
We have some funds available to support UK travel, and can make accessibility adjustments wherever possible.

Please email Kath at [katharine.sherratt@lshtm.ac.uk](mailto:katharine.sherratt@lshtm.ac.uk) for more information and support with travel or accessibility.

We are unable to provide recordings of the workshop. All workshop materials will be available on this website.
:::


<iframe style="border:none;width:100%;" id="contact-form-m3dino" src="https://opnform.com/forms/contact-form-m3dino"></iframe><script type="text/javascript" onload="initEmbed('contact-form-m3dino', { autoResize: true })" src="https://opnform.com/widgets/iframe.min.js"></script>

<button><a href="workshop_invite.ics" download>Download calendar event</a></button>
